name: nuqtaplus
description: نقطة بلس - نظام إدارة نقاط البيع والمخازن

scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "cd backend && pnpm dev" "cd frontend && pnpm dev"
scripts.dev:client: cd frontend && cross-env NODE_ENV=development pnpm dev:client
scripts.dev:web: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "cd backend && pnpm dev" "cd frontend && pnpm dev:web"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && cross-env NODE_ENV=development pnpm dev
scripts.dev:electron: cd frontend && cross-env NODE_ENV=development pnpm dev
scripts.build:server: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:backend && pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run verify:packaged
scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:backend && pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run verify:packaged
scripts.publish:electron: node pumb-version.js && pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:backend && pnpm run publish:frontend && pnpm run verify:packaged
scripts.lint: cd backend && pnpm lint && cd ../frontend && pnpm lint
scripts.format: cd backend && pnpm format && cd ../frontend && pnpm format

author: nuqtaplus Team
